framework: A path qualifies only when >=3 prominent, proven people in the field visibly share the capability, each with a resolving link -- the pattern across standouts is the evidence, not market demand. Ranked by strength of that pattern. Curated editorial, not DOL-derived.

paths.what_it_is: Running a disciplined, high-tempo testing cadence across acquisition, activation, and retention to find and scale repeatable growth loops instead of relying on one-off campaigns.
paths.why_it_signals: The same rigorous, metrics-first experimentation practice recurs across the field's most cited growth leaders, showing it is a learnable operating discipline rather than luck or headcount.

paths.what_it_is: Building a large earned audience by publishing original research, data, and clear educational writing that both search engines and readers reward with organic reach.
paths.why_it_signals: Several independently built content and SEO franchises share the same underlying craft -- turning proprietary research and clear writing into compounding organic distribution -- rather than paid reach or a single lucky post.

paths.what_it_is: Applying statistically sound A/B testing and evidence-based analysis to strip marketing guesswork out of decisions and replace it with validated conversion improvements.
paths.why_it_signals: Leaders across separate companies built their reputations on the same disciplined, trustworthy experimentation methodology rather than intuition, marking it as a transferable craft.
